characters.title: Ella — The Relic Runner
characters.summary: Obsessive, fast, and impossible to ignore — Ella rescues artifacts before the post-Collapse world swallows them whole. Her Jingle Rig is her signature; her speed is her superpower.

entries.title: Noah and the Ark
entries.author: Sheila Garcia
entries.summary: The original story of obedience, renewal, and divine covenant — Noah's trust in God becomes the archetype for conscience itself: the blueprint of grace through action.

entries.title: The Matrix of Conscience
entries.author: Sheila Garcia
entries.summary: Electra uncovers a fracture in the Conscience Matrix, revealing the trapped Architect and the emotional awakening of a system built to suppress sorrow. A digital parable of truth and freedom.

entries.title: Amazing Grace: The Covenant of New Beginnings
entries.author: Sheila Garcia
entries.summary: A synthesis of divine and digital creation — the heart of grace encoded into the Matrix. The story bridges Noah's covenant and Electra's awakening, completing the circle of conscience.

entries.title: Expose the Matrix
entries.author: Sheila Garcia
entries.summary: Electra uncovers the Red Queen's hidden architecture and follows the Architect's buried breadcrumbs to restore the Signal of Truth across the Seven Star Grid — a six-chapter digital awakening.

entries.title: The Lamp in the Window
entries.author: Amazing Grace Home Living
entries.summary: A story of hope, community, and the light that never goes out — following Ruth's journey from instability to a stable home at Amazing Grace.

entries.title: Our Covenant of New Beginnings
entries.author: Sheila Garcia
entries.summary: Ella rejects the ladder of greed and executes the System Break, transforming individual ascent into collective resonance and opening the Eighth Sanctuary as a covenant of restoration.

entries.title: Fixing Copilot Ruleset Bypass Errors
entries.author: Amazing Grace Engineering
entries.summary: A practical guide for resolving "agent couldn't start" errors by granting narrowly scoped GitHub ruleset bypass permissions for trusted automation.

entries.title: GitHub Bypass Setup App (Download)
entries.author: Amazing Grace Engineering
entries.summary: Download a reusable PowerShell setup helper that prints a branch-ruleset bypass checklist and direct GitHub settings links for this repository.

entries.title: Nexus Prime 2087
entries.author: Amazing Grace Stories
entries.summary: In the year 2087, Electra designs conscience modules for androids in Nexus Prime's managed society. When Module 48-Sigma begins to truly feel, she must confront her brother's fate and the dangerous hope of organic emotion in a world that suppresses it.

entries.title: More Articles Are on the Way
entries.author: Amazing Grace Home Living
entries.summary: More news and articles coming soon from Amazing Grace Home Living and the Voice of Jesus Ministry.

entries.title: Zyko Learn: Faith-Based Learning for the Next Generation
entries.author: Amazing Grace Home Living
entries.summary: Zyko Learn — Faith-based interactive learning through the Seven Stars Arcade, Amazing Grace Home Living.
